# Verification Record

## Storage

- Work ID:
- File path: `docs/work/<work-id>/evidence/verification.md`
- Brief: `docs/work/<work-id>/brief.md`
- Plan: `docs/work/<work-id>/plan.md`
- Status: `docs/work/<work-id>/status.md`

## Requirement / stakeholder coverage
